dashboard.communityImpact: Equivalent to removing 340 cars from the road

norway.name: Norway — Herøya Industrial Park
norway.info: World’s leading brownfield green ammonia retrofit integrating renewable hydrogen.

sriLanka.name: Sri Lanka — Emerging Pilot Region
sriLanka.info: Strong solar potential makes it ideal for renewable-powered ammonia production.

kenya.name: Kenya — East African Development Hub
kenya.info: Agricultural demand and industrial growth drive need for sustainable ammonia.

puertoRico.name: Puerto Rico — Caribbean Pilot Site
puertoRico.info: Grid instability highlights need for resilient ammonia-powered microgrids.

about.mission: Provide a sustainable future through energy literacy and green ammonia innovation.
about.vision: Empower communities to understand and benefit from renewable energy systems.
goals: Promote energy literacy and awareness in the community.
Provide clear and transparent diagnostics of the energy system.
Educate the community on the real-world effects of the energy system.
Encourage community engagement and participation in energy-related initiatives.
